Package io.github.projectunified.craftconfig.bungeecord

Class BungeeConfig

java.lang.Object
io.github.projectunified.craftconfig.bungeecord.BungeeConfig
All Implemented Interfaces:
Config, ConfigNode
public class BungeeConfig extends Object implements Config
The bungeecord configuration
